label: Transparent crane motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a red-crowned crane motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A poised red-crowned crane profile with white feathers, ink-black neck and wing accents, vivid red crown, subtle marsh-grey shadows, accurate anatomy, and crisp natural edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the crown, beak, legs, or wing silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white feather detail and ceremonial contrast.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Crane" derived from the transparent red-crowned crane cutout visible in this conversation.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the white feathers, ink black markings, red crown, and marsh neutrals.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 horizontal board, 4K-class source composition, large readable labels, fewer larger panels instead of many tiny tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Crane, Red-Crowned Crane, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Enterprise Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, executive metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style ceremonial enterprise system, precise grid, 8px card radius, ink-line dividers, quiet marsh restraint.
Color palette: use only motif-derived white, ink black, red crown, marsh grey, reed neutrals, and feather fold tones.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Crane".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Crane design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent crane cutout and the light-mode Morphous Crane board visible in this conversation as references. Preserve palette roles, ink-line dividers, ceremonial spacing, component language, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 horizontal board, 4K-class source composition, large readable labels, fewer larger panels instead of many tiny tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Crane, Red-Crowned Crane, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Enterprise Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from ink black and black wing, readable text from white feather, primary accents from red crown, secondary support from marsh reed and mist grey, subtle feather texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
